item.title: AI Infrastructure Is Not One Trade
item.description: ## Product exposure, process-control exposure, and the physical bottlenecks behind the AI capex wave*AI Infrastructure Notes | Part 3**Sinclair Huang*A reader recently left a comment on my ABF substra
